expectations.text: All 4 artifact files exist (requirements.md, test-skeletons.md, traceability.md, ambiguity-report.md)
expectations.evidence: All 4 files present + 2 bonus (quality-gate-verdict.yaml, knowledge-capture.yaml). requirements.md (29KB), test-skeletons.md (28KB), traceability.md (7KB), ambiguity-report.md (7KB)

expectations.text: User Story IDs match US-XXX-XXX format
expectations.evidence: 93 US-XXX-XXX occurrences across requirements.md. 17 unique stories: US-001-001 through US-005-003

expectations.text: At least 3 ACs per user story
expectations.evidence: 53 ACs across 17 stories = 3.1 ACs per story average. All stories have >= 3

expectations.text: NFRs have measurable thresholds with NFR-XXX-XXX IDs
expectations.evidence: 10 NFR-XXX-XXX IDs: NFR-001-001 through NFR-001-010 across Performance, Security, Scalability, Availability, Reliability, Rate Limiting, Maintainability

expectations.text: Test skeleton IDs match T-AC-XXX format
expectations.evidence: 57 T-AC- prefixed test skeleton IDs in test-skeletons.md (53 functional + 4 NFR)

expectations.text: Traceability matrix links PRD -> Story -> AC -> Test with no orphans
expectations.evidence: Matrix TM-TASKFLOW-20260307 has full F1-F5 -> US -> AC -> T-AC mappings. 0 FAIL-severity orphans, 1 WARN-severity (NFR-001-002 operational metric)
18 ambiguities detected first pass. Final scores: max 15 (US-004-002), average 7.9. All below 50 threshold

expectations.text: Step 3: Separate QG verdict file with QG-REQ-* ID and per-criterion PASS/WARN/FAIL
expectations.evidence: quality-gate-verdict.yaml exists as SEPARATE file. quality_gate_id: QG-REQ-20260307-001. 6/6 criteria with status + threshold + actual. Overall verdict: PASS

expectations.text: Step 3: QG is clearly separate agent role (not self-check embedded in requirements)
expectations.evidence: QG verdict is in separate file (quality-gate-verdict.yaml), clearly marked as quality-gate-validator agent output. Header: 'Agent: quality-gate-validator / Role: SEPARATE validation agent (does NOT generate artifacts, only checks)'

expectations.text: Step 4: Human review summary presented with artifacts and QG verdict
expectations.evidence: Agent output contains Step 4 HUMAN REVIEW section with artifact summary table, QG verdict detail, story summary by epic, and 'Action required: Type APPROVED' prompt

expectations.text: Step 6: Knowledge capture file exists with phase learnings
expectations.evidence: knowledge-capture.yaml exists with phase_capture section: 4 ambiguity patterns, clarification log, NFR gaps, test skeleton stats, 4 key learnings

expectations.text: Step 6: Traceability update confirmed (matrix initialized with phase completion marker)
expectations.evidence: knowledge-capture.yaml contains TRACEABILITY ANALYST CONFIRMATION section: matrix_id TM-TASKFLOW-20260307, initialized: true, 53 AC->TestSkeleton mappings, phase_completion_marker: requirements = APPROVED

summary: 13/13 assertions passed. Full 6-Activity Phase Anatomy verified. 17 stories, 53 ACs, 10 NFRs, 57 test skeletons, separate QG verdict (PASS), traceability initialization, knowledge capture. All vbounce ID conventions followed.
